name: here-now-pp-mcp
description: Publish a folder to a live URL in one command, mirror your Drives offline, and never lose an anonymous site to the 24-hour clock.

herenow_api_key.title: HERENOW_API_KEY
herenow_api_key.description: Sets HERENOW_API_KEY for the here.now MCP server. Get a credential from https://here.now/dashboard.
